response:
<> in php replace one url with another within a string e.g. new post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

becomes: new post on the site http://yahoo.com/abc1

use preg replace with a pattern that matches http followed by any characters until the next quote or end of string pattern is /http:\/\/[^"]+/ replace with http://yahoo.com/abc1 this works for repeating strings as above palindrome is madam palindrome is madam palindrome is madam palindrome is madam palindrome is madam
